hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' < /dev/stdin) && [ -n "$file" ] && case "$file" in *.py) uv run ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' < /dev/stdin) && [ -n "$file" ] && case "$file" in .env|*/.env|.env.*|*/.env.*|*.pem|*.key|credentials.json|*/credentials.json|.secrets.baseline|*/.secrets.baseline|infra/environments/*/backend.hcl|*/infra/environments/*/backend.hcl) echo "Protected file: $file" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false' < /dev/stdin | grep -q true && exit 0; changed=$({ git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u); errors=''; py_files=$(printf '%s
' "$changed" | grep '\.py$' || true); tf_files=$(printf '%s
' "$changed" | grep '\.tf$' || true); if [ -n "$py_files" ]; then if ! ruff_out=$(printf '%s
' "$py_files" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 uv run ruff check 2>&1); then errors="$errors
Ruff issues:
$ruff_out"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$tf_files" ]; then if ! fmt_out=$(printf '%s
' "$tf_files" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 terraform fmt -check 2>&1); then errors="$errors
Unformatted Terraform:
$fmt_out"; fi; fi; [ -n "$errors" ] && printf '%b
' "$errors" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
